title: Quantity Surveyor (QS)
description:
Roles & Responsibilities

Cost & Contract Management

  • Prepare and monitor project budgets and cost plans.
  • Prepare Bills of Quantities (BQ), cost estimates, and tender documents.
  • Evaluate and manage subcontractor and supplier quotations.
  • Prepare and process monthly progress claims and final accounts.
  • Assess and process variations, VO claims, and extension of time (EOT) requests.

Project Coordination

  • Collaborate closely with project managers, site engineers, and contractors.
  • Attend site meetings and coordinate with client reps
  • Provide cost advice and financial reporting to ensure project profitability and cost compliance.

Documentation & Reporting

  • Ensure proper documentation of project costs, claims, and variations.
  • Maintain accurate records of measurements, site instructions, and daily work progress.
  • Prepare procurement schedules, materials take-off, and budget forecasts.

Compliance & Risk Management

  • Ensure compliance with contractual obligations and project specifications.
  • Identify potential risks and provide solutions for cost control and efficiency.

Project Types:

  • Cladding
  • Facade
  • Sealant

Job Requirements:

Education & Experience

  • Diploma or Degree in Quantity Surveying, Civil Engineering, or related field.
  • Minimum 3–5 years of relevant experience.

Technical Skills

  • Proficient in cost estimation, tender preparation, and BQ measurement.
  • Familiar with Singapore construction codes, regulations,
  • Competent in using QS-related software (e.g., CostX, Bluebeam, Excel, AutoCAD).

Soft Skills

  • Strong analytical and negotiation skills.
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills.

Ability to work independently and under pressure to meet deadlines.

postedCompany.description:
VINA Specialist Pte Ltd is a leader in providing our clients with a wide range of Rope Access services and solutions. We have full-time rope workforce and have the best track records in providing quality rope access services.


Our Rope Access Technicians are IRATA (Industrial Rope Access Trade Association) trained and certified and have undergone specialized training in different aspects. We provide a comprehensive range of services, which consists of Industrial, Commercial, Residential, Engineering, Lightning Protection System (LPS), Heat Shielding, Bird Management, Wind Turbines, CompEX and Rental & Sales. VINA specializes in integrated services with end-to-end access solutions for Marine Offshore, Oil & Gas, Civil Construction and Structural Maintenance Industries.


VINA has recently explored into a new business venture – Solar Management for Industrial / Commercial / Residential.
postedCompany.name: VINA SPECIALIST PTE. LTD.
